text: The visual field displays multiple spheres encased within glass globes, each globe featuring openings positioned at specific angles.
The instrument is maneuvered to touch the sphere inside the glass globe, avoiding contact with the sides of the globe and without applying pressure to the glass.

The operator uses hand controls to straighten the instrument tips as they enter through the glass opening, successfully touching the inner sphere while avoiding contact with the glass edges and external pressure on the globe.
